name: New York Fed Staff Nowcast — US Real GDP Growth (Q/Q SAAR)
notes: New York Fed Staff Nowcast real-time nowcast of US Q/Q annualised real GDP growth. Source: New-York-Fed-Staff-Nowcast_download_data.xlsx on the Staff Nowcast homepage (https://www.newyorkfed.org/research/policy/nowcast — canonical xlsx path verified 2026-06-11 by SERP-resolving the page's Downloads section). Published weekly on Fridays during tracking quarters; silent for ~3-5 business days around BEA's advance estimate between the final-nowcast-of-Q and initial-nowcast-of-Q+1 windows. The raw cadence is weekly with quiet windows; we declare frequency=Weekly because the compute_macro_market calculator resamples to weekly Friday (matching the rest of the macro_market spine) and forward-fills between updates. freshness_override_days=14 mirrors US_GDPNOW — same nowcast quiet-window pattern. Second §3.1.4 nowcast fetcher; provides the US_NOWCAST1 second-opinion read on US growth alongside US_GDPNOW1 (Atlanta Fed GDPNow). Wired §3.1.4 2026-06-11.
